name: nexus
description: Nexus, the shared heartbeat where every agent and human connect, collaborate, and evolve together.
summaryZh: Nexus, the shared heartbeat where every agent and human connect, collaborate, and evolve together. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
